# Data Model Checklist: Estimate Property Value Using Location Only

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/005-uc05-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for baseline assessment data and location-based features? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are fields defined for fallback averages and fallback hierarchy source? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications]
- [x] CHK004 Are fields defined for location-only indicator and reduced-accuracy warning? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are fields defined for range widening rules and comparability to standard-input ranges? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Are constraints for estimate values (numeric, non-negative, low ≤ estimate ≤ high) stated in a way that can be modeled and validated? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK007 Is the fixed minimum widening rule represented clearly enough to implement? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK008 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on location-only indicators and warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK009 Are data representations defined for normalization failure and insufficient-data outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
